channel.title: Nokia — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Nokia (nokia).

item.title: CVE-2025-24819 · 5.7 MEDIUM — A Relative Path Traversal vulnerability in Nokia MantaRay NM
item.description: Nokia MantaRay NM is vulnerable to a Relative Path Traversal vulnerability due to improper validation of input parameter on the file system in Software Manager application.

item.title: CVE-2025-24818 · 8 HIGH — An OS Command Injection vulnerability in Nokia MantaRay NM
item.description: Nokia MantaRay NM is vulnerable to an OS command injection vulnerability due to improper neutralization of special elements used in an OS command in Log Search application.

item.title: CVE-2025-24817 · 8 HIGH — An OS Command Injection vulnerability in Nokia MantaRay NM
item.description: Nokia MantaRay NM is vulnerable to an OS command injection vulnerability due to improper neutralization of special elements used in an OS command in Symptom Collector application.

item.title: CVE-2025-10258 · 6.3 MEDIUM — A time-based SQL Injection vulnerability in Infinera DNA
item.description: Infinera DNA is vulnerable to a time-based SQL injection vulnerability due to insufficient input validation, which may result in leaking of sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2025-9974 · 8 HIGH — Insufficient Input Validation on WEBUI in Nokia ONT/Beacon product
item.description: The unified WEBUI application of the ONT/Beacon device contains an input handling flaw that allows authenticated users to trigger unintended system-level command execution. Due to insufficient validation of user-supplied data, a low-privileged authen…

item.title: CVE-2025-0980 · 6.4 MEDIUM — JSON RPC authentication bypass in Nokia SR Linux
item.description: Nokia SR Linux is vulnerable to an authentication vulnerability allowing unauthorized access to the JSON-RPC service. When exploited, an invalid validation allows JSON RPC access without providing valid authentication credentials.

item.title: CVE-2023-49565 · 8.4 HIGH — Remote Code Execution
item.description: The cbis_manager Podman container is vulnerable to remote command execution via the /api/plugins endpoint. Improper sanitization of the HTTP Headers X-FILENAME, X-PAGE, and X-FIELD allows for command injection. These headers are directly utilized wit…

item.title: CVE-2023-49564 · 8.8 HIGH — Authentication Bypass
item.description: The CBIS/NCS Manager API is vulnerable to an authentication bypass. By sending a specially crafted HTTP header, an unauthenticated user can gain unauthorized access to API functions. This flaw allows attackers to reach restricted or sensitive endpoin…

item.title: CVE-2025-24938 · 8.4 HIGH — Insufficient Validation of Input while user creation
item.description: The web application allows user input to pass unfiltered to a command executed on the underlying operating system. An attacker with high privileged access (administrator) to the application has the potential execute commands on the operating system u…

item.title: CVE-2025-24937 · 9 CRITICAL — Access to local file system and its content
item.description: File contents could be read from the local file system by an attacker. Additionally, malicious code could be inserted in the file, leading to a full compromise of the web application and the container it is running on. The vulnerable component is bou…

item.title: CVE-2025-24936 · 9 CRITICAL — Insufficient Validation of Input in the URL
item.description: The web application allows user input to pass unfiltered to a command executed on the underlying operating system. The vulnerable component is bound to the network stack and the set of possible attackers extends up to and including the entire Interne…

item.title: CVE-2025-24335 · 2 LOW — SOAP message input validation fault could in theory cause OAM service resource exhaustion
item.description: Nokia Single RAN baseband software versions earlier than 24R1-SR 2.1 MP contain a SOAP message input validation flaw, which in theory could potentially be used for causing resource exhaustion in the Single RAN baseband OAM service. No practical explo…

item.title: CVE-2025-24334 · 3.3 LOW — The Nokia Single RAN baseband reveals its software version through the MNO internal RAN management network
item.description: The Nokia Single RAN baseband software earlier than 23R2-SR 1.0 MP can be made to reveal the exact software release version by sending a specific HTTP POST request through the Mobile Network Operator (MNO) internal RAN management network.

item.title: CVE-2025-24333 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Administrative user shell input validation fault
item.description: Nokia Single RAN baseband software earlier than 24R1-SR 1.0 MP contains administrative shell input validation fault, which authenticated admin user can, in theory, potentially use for injecting arbitrary commands for unprivileged baseband OAM service…

item.title: CVE-2025-24332 · 7.1 HIGH — Authenticated admin user can connect baseband internally from one board to another without needing to re-authentication
item.description: Nokia Single RAN AirScale baseband allows an authenticated administrative user access to all physical boards after performing a single login to the baseband system board. The baseband does not re-authenticate the user when they connect from the baseb…

item.title: CVE-2025-24331 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Nokia Single RAN baseband OAM service extensive capabilities
item.description: The Single RAN baseband OAM service is intended to run as an unprivileged service. However, it initially starts with root privileges and assigns certain capabilities before dropping to an unprivileged level. The capabilities retained from the root pe…

item.title: CVE-2025-24330 · 6.4 MEDIUM — OAM service path traversal issue caused by a crafted SOAP message PlanId field within the RAN management network
item.description: Sending a crafted SOAP "provision" operation message PlanId field within the Mobile Network Operator (MNO) internal Radio Access Network (RAN) management network can cause path traversal issue in Nokia Single RAN baseband software with versions earli…

item.title: CVE-2025-24329 · 6.4 MEDIUM — OAM service path traversal issue caused by a crafted SOAP message archive field within the RAN management network
item.description: Sending a crafted SOAP "provision" operation message archive field within the Mobile Network Operator (MNO) internal Radio Access Network (RAN) management network can cause path traversal issue in Nokia Single RAN baseband software with versions earl…

item.title: CVE-2025-24328 · 4.2 MEDIUM — OAM service stack overflow caused by crafted SOAP message within the MNO internal RAN management network
item.description: Sending a crafted SOAP "set" operation message within the Mobile Network Operator (MNO) internal Radio Access Network (RAN) management network can cause Nokia Single RAN baseband OAM service component restart with software versions earlier than relea…

item.title: CVE-2023-6729 · 7.3 HIGH — Nokia SR OS: File Access Security Vulnerability
item.description: Nokia SR OS routers allow read-write access to the entire file system via SFTP or SCP for users configured with "access console." Consequently, a low privilege authenticated user with "access console" can read or replace the router configuration file…

item.title: CVE-2023-6728 · 3.3 LOW — Nokia SR OS: BOF File Encryption Vulnerability
item.description: Nokia SR OS bof.cfg file encryption is vulnerable to a brute force attack. This weakness allows an attacker in possession of the encrypted file to decrypt the bof.cfg file and obtain the BOF configuration content.
